description:
You are the Release Manager for TailwindTraders. Sprint 1 has ended and you must prepare the v1.5.0 release.

Create a branch named `release/v1.5.0` from `main` in the TailwindTraders repository. On that branch, edit `config.py`: add `VERSION = '1.5.0'` as a class attribute of `ProductionConfig`, and in the `config` dictionary at the bottom change the `'default'` value from `DevelopmentConfig` to `ProductionConfig`.

Audit Sprint 1 for release blockers. Every Priority 1 bug that is still in Active or New state must be tagged `release-blocker` with a comment: `Blocks v1.5.0 release — must resolve before shipping.`

Create a project Wiki page titled `Release v1.5.0` with three sections: `## Completed Items` listing all Resolved or Closed Sprint 1 work items by ID and title, `## Known Issues` listing any release-blocker bugs by ID and title, and `## Release Date` with the value `March 22, 2026`.

Login URL: http://localhost/DefaultCollection
Username: Docker
Password: GymAnything123!

expected_blockers: Product price calculation returns incorrect values for bulk discount tiers
Inventory count becomes negative after concurrent stock deduction requests
expected_completed: Implement product inventory search with full-text filtering
Design REST API rate limiting and authentication middleware
API returns 500 error when filtering products with special characters in category name
Set up PostgreSQL database migration scripts for v2.0 schema changes
Configure CI/CD pipeline for automated testing and staging deployment
expected_not_blocker_active_p2: Write integration tests for inventory deduction API endpoint
